top_signals.title: Gold price nearly flat on the year as rate hike chances surge
top_signals.summary: Spot gold declined as much as 3% to $4,330 an ounce, its lowest since March.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Pay Attention to Crawford’s Public at Sha Tin
top_signals.summary: SERIOUS minded bettors in Hong Kong will need to keep a close-watch on the weather again, as racing gets underway at the later time of 9.00am for an 11-race programme at Sha Tin on Sunday. There have plenty of thunderstorms and heavy showers circling the city over the last few days, and it is anyone’s [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
